name: @wxyc/apple-music-url-backfill
description: One-shot remediation: re-query LML for album_metadata + flowsheet rows whose apple_music_url was persisted as null despite a positive match signal (discogs_url present or library.on_streaming), then fill ONLY the still-null rows. Dry-run by default; pass --execute to write. Gated on LML#782. BS#1631.
